title: Hotel Management AI Chatbot
description: Multi-agent AI system built with LangChain + Groq Llama 3.3. Implements Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for automated guest services, with a relational DB schema via SQLAlchemy ORM. Automated reporting is distributed through SMTP and scheduled with APScheduler.

title: Large-Scale City Partitioning
description: Processed a 6 GB city-scale dataset using Mini-Batch K-Means with incremental partial-fit. Segments geographic regions without loading the full dataset into memory — memory-efficient unsupervised ML at scale.

title: Cricket Player Performance Dashboard
description: Power BI analytics dashboard transforming 5,000+ raw data points from Excel into automated KPIs (Strike Rate, Average, Boundary Frequency) via a Power Query ETL pipeline.

title: RAG-Based Conversational AI System
description: Fully offline RAG pipeline using LangChain, Ollama, and ChromaDB. Delivers accurate, context-aware Q&A over institutional PDF documents with zero cloud dependency.
